scripts.build: export VITE_BUILD_ENV=${VITE_BUILD_ENV:-${APP_ENV:-$(grep '^APP_ENV=' ../../../.env 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2-)}} && export VITE_BUILD_ENV=${VITE_BUILD_ENV:-staging} && export VITE_FE_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) && export VITE_BE_SHA=${VITE_BE_SHA:-$(git -C ../../.. rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)} && export VITE_BUILD_SHA=${VITE_BUILD_ENV}@${VITE_FE_SHA}/${VITE_BE_SHA} && tsc && vite build
